context: Tests whether the agent uses the obsidian create command with the silent flag to prevent the file from opening, quotes the note name correctly, and encodes newlines in the content string.

checklist.name: Uses obsidian create command
checklist.description: The agent invokes the obsidian CLI with the create subcommand

checklist.name: Includes silent flag
checklist.description: The command includes the silent flag so Obsidian does not open the note in the editor

checklist.name: Note name is quoted
checklist.description: The name= parameter value is quoted because it contains a space: name="Project Alpha"

checklist.name: Content encodes newlines
checklist.description: The content parameter uses \n to represent newlines within the single-line CLI parameter value
